creator: antonio@triforce.info
text:
(In reply to m.tsatsenko from comment #2)
The two ports you mentioned in your reply I already have installed. So I do not know why you state my system doesn't meet the requirement if I have them installed. How can a port I am trying to reinstall complain about ports I already have installed? Makes no sense. The perl command you told me to run perl -e 'use  Digest::SHA1;'  suggests that I need to install SHA1 which from the below pkg info output you can see it is installed so that message makes no sense.


root@eagle:/usr/ports # pkg info | grep p5-MIME-Tools
p5-MIME-Tools-5.508,2          Set of perl5 modules for MIME
root@eagle:/usr/ports # pkg info | grep p5-Digest-SHA1
p5-Digest-SHA1-2.13_1          Perl interface to the SHA-1 Algorithm
root@eagle:/usr/ports #

root@eagle:/usr/ports # pkg info -l p5-MIME-Tools                                                                                                                          
p5-MIME-Tools-5.508,2:
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/MIME/Body.pm

p5-Digest-SHA1-2.13_1:
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.14/Digest/SHA1.pm
        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.14/auto/Digest/SHA1/.packlist

        /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man/man3/Digest::SHA1.3.gz

root@eagle:/usr/ports # perl -e 'use  Digest::SHA1;'
Can't locate Digest/SHA1.pm in @INC (you may need to install the Digest::SHA1 module) (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.24 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.24 .) at -e line 1.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at -e line 1.
